items.title_ur: Jefferies’ ‘Greed & Fear’ strategist cuts بٹ کوائن allocation to zero on quantum risk
summary_en: Jefferies’ ‘Greed & Fear’ strategist cuts Bitcoin allocation to zero on quantum risk
Jefferies’ Greed & Fear strategist Christopher Wood has slashed a 10% Bitcoin allocation from his portfolio and moved into gold, citing the quantum risk to BTC, Bloomberg reports.
